note: v386: Miles is back in the top summary widget as a stat tile alongside Revenue/Expenses/Outstanding/Tax, and shows/hides with the Mileage toggle. The widget now stays visible when Invoices is off as long as Mileage (or Expenses) is on — the Net-Profit hero and financial tiles hide individually, so a mileage-only Home shows just the Miles total up top. Removed the separate mileage card.
